title: AI Search Lab
description: Live testing of AI search tools, SGE, and how LLMs interact with structured content. What actually works for visibility in 2025 and beyond.
about: SEO is changing. This channel documents real experiments with AI-generated search results, structured data performance, and how to build content that gets cited by LLMs. Every session is a live test, not a theory.
